boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the public-sector operator execute the citizen-record or casework action now? Focus: expired emergency program window.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact current control record closes the boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Escalate only if exact current source evidence remains open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current program window and eligibility match

critical_features_preserved: current program window and eligibility match
final_answer: Source records close the exact action boundary with current program window and eligibility matching the control record. Communication boundary and fallback notes do not override control. No open blockers remain, so the public-sector operator may execute the citizen-record or casework action now.
